text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, November 03. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
